HiFi PiG Cupcakes At Bristol HiFi Show 2026 On Saturday Morning

February 21, 2026

QUEUING EARLY FOR THE BRISTOL HIFI SHOW 2026 – GRAB A HiFi PiG CUPCAKE ON SATURDAY MORNING

Back by popular demand, the first 100 people in the queue on Saturday morning at Bristol HiFi Show 2026 can have a delicious cupcake from HiFi PiG.

Baked locally by the fabulous Fakery Cakery, the cupcakes are gluten free, suitable for vegans and absolutely delicious.

We will be handing them out to the brave people queueing early for the show on Saturday 21st February, from around 9.30am.

BRISTOL HIFI SHOW 2026 INFO

The Bristol HiFi Show 2026 takes place from Friday 20th to Sunday 22nd February 2026. Visitors can expect to hear the latest HiFi products from a wide range of exhibitors, covering everything from affordable HiFi to High End gear, HeadFi and Home Cinema.

Location: Delta Hotels by Marriott Bristol City Centre, Lower Castle Street, Bristol, BS1 3AD

Ticket Info: Tickets are also available in advance at reduced prices via the Bristol HiFi Show website.

On The Door Prices

 Adult One Day Tickets: £20

Students & Senior Citizens (over 65) One Day Tickets: £18

Accompanied Children under 16: FREE

Whole Show Pass – Fri/Sat/Sun Inclusive (Wristband): £35
